name: each revealed namespace is annotated with an activated flag and a via provenance field
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); fs=d["full_surface"]; exit(fs.all?{|e|e.key?("namespace") && (e["activated"]==true||e["activated"]==false) && e.key?("via")} ? 0:1)' && echo reveal-annotated 1>&2
